name: Crowd.dev
description: Crowd.dev — Open-source developer community platform for tracking contributors across GitHub, Slack, and Discord.

seo.title: Crowd.dev — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Crowd.dev: Crowd.dev — Open-source developer community platform for tracking contributors across GitHub, Slack, and Discord.

when_to_use: Tracking open-source contributors across GitHub and Slack
Identifying at-risk community members before they churn
Developer community growth metrics in one open dashboard
Syncing community member data with a CRM for GTM
Automating developer relations outreach based on activity

review.verdict: A credible open-source alternative to Common Room for teams that value control over polish.
review.best_for: OSS maintainers and dev rel teams wanting self-hostable community intelligence.
review.not_for: Ops teams expecting turnkey SaaS UX and full-time support SLAs.
